title: Kaanakozhikku Lyrics Suyamvaram
stanzas:
Kaanakozhikku kaluthula vella
nee ketukkadi ennoda solla (2)

samsaaram minsaaram thotta
shock-u adikkum di
sanyaasam ponaakkaa
life-u soakka irukkum di

jaadi koru moodi venumya
indha life pona
vera life laedhuyaa

Kaanakozhikku kaluthula vella
nee ketukkadi ennoda solla

samsaaram minsaaram
illatina life illa
sanyaasi aanaakkaa
adhula oru life illa

jaadi venaa lady venaadi
ammaadi ammaadi
aysha KD ponnu
jodi venaadi

Kaanakozhikku kaluthula vella
nee ketukkadi ennoda solla

beach irukkukdhu
katila kaathu adikkudhu

beach irukkukdhu
kaathu adikkudhu
alai adikkudhu
whistle adikkudhu
nandu irukkudhu
sandhu irukkudhu
sedi odhungudhu
oadi pathungudhu
samaacharatha nenachu paaruya
azhagu samsaaramthaan
unaku thevayaa

nandu samsaarithaan
samsaaramthaan
kodakulithaan adhukirudha
noi irukkuthaa
nodi irukkuthaa
... irukkudhaa
fees irukkudhaa
aaga poren bhramacharima

nee azhudhum enna
I am sorry ma

... roja poo
urasi paartha maththaapu
azhaga konja isthu poduya
nee aasapatta bitu paaruya

sela kattina
ponnungala nambithaan
periya raajakallaam
pottaan thundathaan

Kaanakozhikku kaluthula vella
nee ketukkadi ennoda solla

asai irukkudhu
nenjula paasam irukkudhu

asai irukkudhu
paasam irukkudhu
pazham irukkudhu
paluthirukkudhu
azhagirukkudhu
vayasirukkduhu
nenjil iruppadha
solla thudiikkdhu
pathinaaru pulla
pekka venumyaa
adhula record onnu
padaikka venumyaa

naadirukkudhu
neranji irukkudhu
rendu brother-u
aaru sister-u
father padichavar
mother padikkala
family planning
kaettu nadakkala
neeyum peththaa
naadu thaangumaa
un panju udambu
pinji pogumaa

adhigam peththaa guinness
illattina minus-u
unakku mattum aasaiyillayaa
naan eppozhuddhum chinna
pullaiyaa

getup paaya
paayaa paayaa thaan
naan eppodhume
single chaayaa thaan

seo.title: Kaanakozhikku Lyrics Suyamvaram
seo.description: Full Kaanakozhikku songs lyrics, Suyamvaram Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Music: Deva, Singer(s): Anuradha Sriram, Sabesan.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kaanakozhikku?

The song is an upbeat and energetic number that celebrates life and its vibrant moments.

Who composed the music for Suyamvaram?

The music for Suyamvaram was composed by Deva.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song is featured in a lively sequence that highlights the joyous and festive atmosphere of the film.

When was Suyamvaram released?

The movie Suyamvaram was released in 1999.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kaanakozhikku from the movie Suyamvaram is a high-energy track that captures the essence of celebration and joy. Sung by Anuradha Sriram and Sabesan, the song features lively beats and an infectious rhythm composed by Deva. It is set in a festive context within the movie, adding to the vibrant atmosphere of the scene. The lyrics convey a sense of fun and enjoyment, making it a perfect fit for parties and celebrations.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the vibrant energy of Kaanakozhikku from the movie Suyamvaram. With Anuradha Sriram and Sabesan's dynamic vocals paired with Deva's lively composition, this song is a true celebration of rhythm and joy. Dive into the electrifying beats that make this track a must-listen!
stanzaMeanings: The white necklace on the peacock's neck, listen to what I say.
Marriage is like electricity, it can shock you. If you become a monk, life will be peaceful.
You need a caste certificate, because if this life is gone, there's no other life.
The white necklace on the peacock's neck, listen to what I say.
Without marriage, there's no life. If you become a monk, there's no life in that either.
Do you want a caste or a lady? Oh dear, do you want a match for Aysha KD?
The white necklace on the peacock's neck, listen to what I say.
The beach is there, the wind is blowing.

The beach is there, the wind is blowing, waves are hitting, whistling is heard, crabs are there, sand is there, plants are hiding, running and hiding. Think about the news, do you need the beauty of marriage?
Crabs are social, marriage is like a headache, there's a disease, there's a fee. I'm going to become a monk.
What if you cry? I am sorry, dear.
Believing in girls with sarees, even kings have lost everything.
The white necklace on the peacock's neck, listen to what I say.
There is desire in the heart, there is love.
There is desire, there is love, there is fruit, it is ripe, it is beautiful, there is age. The heart is beating to say it. Do you want to have sixteen children and set a record?
There are four brothers and six sisters. Father is educated, mother is not. They didn't follow family planning. If you have children, can the country bear it? Will your soft body wither away?
If you have too many children, there's no Guinness record, only a minus. Don't you have any desires? Am I always a child?
Getup is always the same, I am always single.
The white necklace on the peacock's neck, listen to what I say.
Marriage is like electricity, it can shock you. If you become a monk, life will be peaceful.
You need a caste certificate, because if this life is gone, there's no other life.
